metadata.title: Privacy Policy - Open Health
metadata.description: Open Health Privacy Policy — how we collect, use, and protect your health data and personal information.

overview.title: Overview
overview.desc: Open Health (hereinafter "the Service") values your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data when you use the Service.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.accountDesc: : Email address, password (encrypted). If you sign in with Google, we receive your Google account name and email.
dataCollected.profileDesc: : Height, weight, age, gender, and other information you provide, used to calculate daily nutrition goals.
dataCollected.dietDesc: : Food entries, nutrient intake, water intake, weight changes, and other health tracking data you record.
dataCollected.imageDesc: : Nutrition label photos you upload, processed by AI recognition and not stored long-term.

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Data
dataUsage.intro: We only use your data for the following purposes:
dataUsage.item1: - Providing core features such as diet logging, nutrition tracking, and weight management
dataUsage.item2: - Using AI to recognize nutrition labels and simplify food logging
dataUsage.item3: - Calculating and displaying personalized nutrition goals and progress

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.intro: The Service uses the following third-party services:
thirdParty.gemini: : Used for nutrition label image recognition. Uploaded images are sent to the Google API for processing.
thirdParty.sentry: : Used for error tracking and service stability monitoring, may collect anonymous error report data.

security.title: Data Storage & Security
security.item1: - Your data is stored in a protected PostgreSQL database
security.item2: - Passwords are encrypted; we cannot access your plain-text password
security.item3: - All data transmission is encrypted via HTTPS

rights.title: Your Data Rights
rights.intro: You have full control over your data:
rights.accessDesc: : You can view all your data at any time
rights.exportDesc: : You can export your complete data
rights.deleteDesc: : You can request deletion of your account and all related data
rights.portabilityDesc: : We will never prevent you from taking your data with you
rights.outro: We will not create any data export barriers to retain users, or do anything that harms user interests.

wontDo.title: What We Won't Do
wontDo.item1: - We will not sell your personal data to third parties
wontDo.item2: - We will not serve ads in the service
wontDo.item3: - We will not share your data without your consent
wontDo.item4: - We will not use your health data for marketing

changes.title: Policy Changes
changes.desc: This privacy policy may be updated periodically. For significant changes, we will notify you through in-app notifications or email. Continued use of the Service indicates your agreement to the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us via email:
